data.body:
[Hot Springs Resort No. 227 Daily Logs Celebration Gift]

Sensei, Schale prepared a celebration gift for the new event!
Please check your mailbox for your gift of Pyroxene x1,200 & Tech Notes!
(Available until 7/19/2022 14:59 PM.(UTC))
